titleStmt.title: SII 19.71: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 71. (A.R. No. 136 of 1929.) LĀLGUḌI, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE OUTER NORTH WALL OF THE AMMAṈ SHRINE, SAPTAṚISHIŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This records a gift of 32 kaḻañju of gold deposited with the assembly of Maṇaṟkāl, by Māṟṟukaḷvi daughter of Kaḍambaṉ Māṟaṉ of Nallamaṅgalam a brahmadēya in Iḍaiyāṟṟu-nāḍu, for maintaining with the interest thereon, a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tirunachchiyūr-Perumāḷ situated on the east side of the village. The assembly is stated to have utilised this amount towards the exemption of taxes on six plots of wet land and three of dry land belonging to the temple, measuring nine mā and one mundirigai in all. The contents of this inscription make it evident that it belonged to another temple, situated at Maṇaṟkāl, of which the inscribed stones should have been utilised in the construction of the shrine at this place.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kopparakesaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 3- ṟāvatu maṇaṟkkāl
sabhaiyom Ivvūr kiḻai tirunacciyūr perumāḷukku Iravum pakalum
Oru nontāviḷak kerippataṟkku Iṭaiyāṟṟu nāṭṭu brahmadeyam nallima
ṅkalattu koyilāṉ kaṭampaṉ māṟaṉ makaḷ māṟṟukaḷvi vaitta poṉ
3 10 2� Immuppattirukaḻañcu poṉṉum koṇṭu Ippoṉṉukku
palicaiyāl Iravum pakalum cantrādityaval Oru nontāviḷakku Erippa
tāka Ittevar nilam Iṟaiyiḻicca nilamāvaṉ kiḻpulattu neṭuṅka
rai Araimāvum Ippulatte mukkāṇiyum Ippulatte naṭuviṟkkarai nāṉmā
vum kāṭupokkil Araimāvum kāṭukāḷvāttu Araimāvum Itaṉ kiḻai Arai
māvum Āka nilam kāle mukkāṇi Araikkāṇiyum puṉcey tirumañcuṇat
tuṟaiyiṉ mel � mākāṇiyum vaṭavaḻi toṭṭattu nayantāṅki viṇṇakar pe
rumāḷ muṉṟumāviṉ melatu vaṭakkaṭaiya Araimāvum tiruttavattuṟaiyaṭikaḷ Am
palattiṉ teṉvāy Araimā muntirikaiyum Āka puṉcey Iraṇṭu mākkāṇi munti
rikaiyum Eṟṟi puṉceyu meṉceyumāka Oṉpatumā muntirikai nilamum Iṟaiyiḻi
ttu kuṭuttu Imāṟṟukalvi vaitta nilaiviḷakkile Erippatā
kavum Idevar nilam Eppe(o)ṟpaṭṭatum kuṭuttom sabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.71 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
